1.png.title: Desert Interceptor
1.png.description: A deep red, metallic naked street motorcycle with a matte black frame and minimal bodywork exposing the engine, parked on cracked asphalt with heat haze rising in the background.

2.png.title: Neon Shibuya Strike
2.png.description: Two modern naked bikes, one blue and one grey, navigating the rain-slicked intersections of Shibuya at night under intense neon billboard lighting.

3.png.title: Cotswold Cafe Racer
3.png.description: A vintage, custom naked cafe racer with a polished aluminum tank and leather seat, parked on a cobblestone street in a historic English village.

4.png.title: Hyper-Naked Alp Attack
4.png.description: A hyper-naked sports motorcycle with an exposed blue trellis frame captured mid-lean while navigating a sharp mountain hairpin turn in the Alps.

5.png.title: Pacific Coast Cruiser
5.png.description: A dark bronze modern naked power cruiser parked at sunset on a cliffside overlooking the Pacific Ocean and the Bixby Creek Bridge.

6.png.title: Route 66 Streetfighter
6.png.description: A customized naked streetfighter with an exposed trellis frame in matte gray and orange, parked near an abandoned desert structure.

7.png.title: Scandinavian Sport-Tourer
7.png.description: A modern naked sport-touring bike with small panniers parked on a scenic coastal bridge at sunset over the North Sea.

8.png.title: Concept Exoskeleton
8.png.description: A minimal naked concept bike featuring a polished titanium exoskeleton and an exposed electric powertrain on a fabrication table.

9.png.title: Monte Carlo Twilight Muscle
9.png.description: A blacked-out naked muscle bike parked at twilight in front of the illuminated Casino de Monte-Carlo.

10.png.title: Desert Electric Drag
10.png.description: A futuristic naked electric drag bike with a raw titanium lattice frame performing a high-speed run on vast, dusty salt flats.
